content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.propietary') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.propietary
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE  silver.propietary
WITH
(
    DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
    LOCATION = 'silver/propietary',
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
)AS
SELECT * FROM bronze.propietary
GO

SELECT *  FROM silver.propietary
GO
